_note: Static reference table for canvas2d week-1 harness. 'Bridge' here refers to the C++-side widget_bridge.cpp register_function('canvas...') surface. Entries claim what the bridge SHOULD route to. Gotchas section documents known production-hardened deviations from spec; harness flags DIVERGE when a catalog entry is marked 'supported' but the gotcha says it can't be fully implemented.

arc.notes: pulp #1521 — native SkPath::arcTo (Skia) / CGPathAddArc (CG). Replaces the bezier approximation.

arcTo.notes: pulp #1521 — native SkPath::arcTo(p1,p2,r) (Skia) / CGPathAddArcToPoint (CG). Replaces lineTo-only fallback.

ellipse.notes: pulp #1521 — native SkPath::arcTo through SkMatrix rotation (Skia) / CGPathAddArc through CGAffineTransform (CG). Honours rotation.

roundRect.notes: pulp #1521 — native SkRRect::MakeRectRadii (Skia) / per-corner CGPath layout (CG). Supports number, [r], [r1,r2], [r1,r2,r3], [r1,r2,r3,r4], and {x,y} elliptical corners.

clip.notes: Falls back to canvasClipRect bounds when path-mode unsupported.

isPointInPath.notes: PR #1724: 2-arg form (x,y) using current path is fully wired; Path2D-object first arg deferred to a separate JS shim object (#1527)
isPointInPath.gotcha: synchronous return; no bridge round-trip; bridge-thin gap-fill (pulp #1527)

isPointInStroke.notes: PR #1724: round caps + bevel/round joins exact; lineCap (square) / lineJoin (miter spikes) approximated as round in JS-side polyline mirror
isPointInStroke.gotcha: pairs with isPointInPath; same JS path mirror (pulp #1527)

getTransform.notes: pulp #1527 bridge-thin gap-fill. Returns DOMMatrix-shaped object reflecting the JS-mirrored 2D affine transform — synchronous (no bridge round-trip). Mutating the returned object does NOT affect the live ctx (spec-compliant).

fillText.notes: pulp #1525 — maxWidth plumbed end-to-end; backend squeezes horizontally via SkMatrix::Scale (Skia) / CGContextScaleCTM (CG). Glyph clusters preserved (HarfBuzz / CoreText).

strokeText.notes: pulp #1525 — dedicated stroke_text cmd; Skia uses SkPaint::kStroke_Style, CG uses kCGTextStroke. maxWidth squeeze matches fillText. Falls back to fillText with strokeStyle on pre-#1525 hosts (no canvasStrokeText fn).

measureText.notes: Falls back to char-width estimate when bridge fn unregistered.

transform.notes: PR #1701: arbitrary concat wired via canvasSetTransform — composes M' = M * given on the JS-side mirror, forwards the FULL composed matrix to the bridge (see web-compat-canvas.js:899). Pre-#1701 oracle listed canvasTranslate (the deprecated pure-translation fast path); Codex P2 on #1729 corrected the bridge ref so a regression in canvasSetTransform wiring would now be caught.

createLinearGradient.notes: Constructs JS-side CanvasGradient; flushed via canvasSetLinearGradient on fillStyle assign.

createRadialGradient.notes: pulp #1524. True two-circle radial gradient: Skia routes via SkGradientShader::MakeTwoPointConical, CG via CGContextDrawRadialGradient(start_centre, start_radius, end_centre, end_radius). Bridge dispatches via canvasSetRadialGradientTwoCircles (single-circle path retained for legacy hot-reloaded bundles).

createConicGradient.notes: pulp #1524. Skia routes via SkGradientShader::MakeSweep (real sweep). CG software-rasterises a CGImage of the active clip's bounding box (per-pixel atan2 sweep + colour-stop interpolation) and paints it via CGContextDrawImage.

createPattern.notes: pulp #1524. Skia: SkShader::MakeImage with SkTileMode per axis (real tiled fill across all four repetition values). CG: CGPatternCreate + CGPatternCallbacks (image-tile draw callback) + CGContextSetFillPattern; `no_repeat` axes blow up the tile step beyond the clip bbox so only the seed tile lands. Image source decoded via ImageIO. Stroke patterns are still no-ops on CG (file a follow-up if needed).

addColorStop.notes: JS-side accumulator on CanvasGradient; flushed positionally via canvasSetLinearGradient. SKILL gotcha #2.

drawImage.notes: pulp #1737 — 9-arg source-rect form (sprite-sheet slicing) now plumbed end-to-end. JS shim passes sx/sy/sw/sh as args[6..9]; bridge sets has_source_rect; canvas widget routes through Canvas::draw_image_from_file_rect (Skia: SkCanvas::drawImageRect with src+dst). 3-arg form uses shim default sizing.

getImageData.notes: PR #1724: real backends (Skia + CG) return real pixel data; RecordingCanvas returns zero-filled by design (records draw commands without rasterization)
getImageData.gotcha: base64 round-trip avoids typed-array bridge cost (issue-916)

putImageData.notes: Shim base64-encodes the ImageData. pulp #1737 — 7-arg sub-rect form sliced row-by-row in JS shim before encoding; bridge contract unchanged.

setLineDash.notes: Pattern + lineDashOffset both passed; bridge does odd-length array doubling per HTML5 spec.

fillStyle.notes: Solid color OR CanvasGradient. Gradient stops flushed via positional args. SKILL gotcha #2. pulp #1524 — radial gradient flushes via the two-circle bridge fn when both circles are present.

strokeStyle.notes: pulp Wave 3 c2d.7 — CSS color OR CanvasGradient (linear, radial, two-circle radial, conic) OR CanvasPattern. _applyStrokeStyle dispatches per-kind. Skia: stroke_shader_ flows through apply_stroke_state → SkPaint::setShader.

miterLimit.notes: pulp #1434 bridge-thin gap-fill. Sticky stroke state. Skia: SkPaint::setStrokeMiter. CG: CGContextSetMiterLimit. Spec: ≤0/NaN/Infinity ignored at the shim.

lineDashOffset.notes: Wave 4 c2d cleanup — defineProperty getter/setter pair re-flushes the active dash pattern via canvasSetLineDash on every assignment, so mutating between draws shifts the stroke phase without a redundant setLineDash call.

font.notes: pulp #1434 — shim parses the full CSS font shorthand ([style] [variant] [weight] [stretch] <size>[/<lineHeight>] <family>). canvasSetFontFull plumbs weight + slant; small-caps variant is parsed but not honoured in the Skia/CG pipeline.

imageSmoothingEnabled.notes: pulp #1434 bridge-thin gap-fill. Sticky paint flag. Skia: SkSamplingOptions(kLinear vs kNearest). CG: CGContextSetInterpolationQuality(Low vs None).

imageSmoothingQuality.notes: pulp #1434 bridge-thin gap-fill. Skia: low=kLinear, medium=+mipmap, high=Mitchell cubic. CG: kCGInterpolationLow/Medium/High.

shadowBlur.notes: issue-1434 batch 7. Sticky state on the C++ canvas — Skia DropShadow image filter, CG CGContextSetShadowWithColor.

shadowColor.notes: issue-1434 batch 7. CSS color string parsed via the shared parseColor helper.

shadowOffsetX.notes: issue-1434 batch 7. Sticky offset in CSS pixels; combines with shadowOffsetY.

shadowOffsetY.notes: issue-1434 batch 7. Sticky offset in CSS pixels; combines with shadowOffsetX.

filter.gotcha: css-filter-list parser local to skia_canvas.cpp; pulp #1520 wired the JS shim + bridge + Skia chain.
filter.notes: PR #1724: 9 filter functions + drop-shadow wired; url(#filter-id) is arch-no-svg-filter-refs (Pulp doesn't have SVG filter graph) — documented architectural ceiling

direction.gotcha: real bidi (mixed LTR/RTL paragraphs) requires full SkShaper run-splitting; ltr/rtl uniform-direction works.
direction.notes: PR #1724: ltr/rtl/inherit basic forms wired; full bidi for mixed-script paragraphs is arch-skparagraph-bidi (deferred to SkParagraph plumbing #1506) — documented architectural ceiling

gotchas.transform-no-concat: ctx.transform(a,b,c,d,e,f): bridge only exposes replace (setTransform); pure-translation falls through, rotate/scale/skew is no-op (PR #1348 deferred).
gotchas.no-strokeText-path: strokeText: pulp #1525 added the dedicated canvasStrokeText bridge fn + Skia/CG overrides. The shim falls back to fillText-with-strokeStyle only on pre-#1525 hosts.
